title: region — published macros
description: No Blueprint schema macros. The region module does NOT publish schema-level composition helpers — Branch adds region_id via its own explicit column declaration (Wave 2b). Two runtime macros are published on `Illuminate\Http\Request` for `active-region`-flavoured helpers on inbound requests.
namespace_note: Runtime macros extend `Illuminate\Http\Request`. Registered by `RegionServiceProvider::boot()` during framework boot.

macros.name: Request::activeRegion
macros.description: Returns the Region row the middleware `region.resolve_active` resolved for THIS request. Reads (in order): (1) the `X-Region-Id` header if the caller's active tenant has a Region on that slug/id + it's not archived; (2) the tenant's Region where `is_default = true`; (3) null if the caller has no active tenant (platform-plane request).

macros.name: Request::activeRegionId
macros.description: Shorthand for `$request->activeRegion()?->id`. Returns the region ULID (`reg_*`) or null. Cheap — reads from the middleware-populated slot; never queries the DB.

registration_order: Registered during the standard boot phase. Depends on tenancy having booted first so the tenant scope is already registered when the macros run — tenancy priority (10) < region priority (40) so ordering is safe by construction. Also depends on the `region.resolve_active` middleware having run in the request pipeline before the macros are called; the middleware populates the RequestContext slot the macros read from.
